column1:
Explain the Python interpreter and the role of an interactive interpreter in executing a program.  
Define basic Python terms, including interpreter, code, line, and prompt.  
Differentiate between code statements, expressions, variables, the print() function, and comments.  
Modify and execute a simple Python program.
